ValidationRule.description: The Time Card can not be changed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsHRManager__c =false, $User.IsProjectManager__c =false,
OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Package__r.PackageStatus__c , "Open")), AND( NOT(ISBLANK( Package__r.PackageSuperior__c )), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Package__r.PackageSuperior__r.PackageStatus__c,"Open")) ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to create or change a Time Card since the Package or Parent Package is closed. Please contact the Project Manager for assistance. (TC001)
